title: Proof Boundary — Agentic DevOps Beyond CI/CD
supported_claims: Secure delivery decisions can draw on vulnerability management, lifecycle security practices, source and build assurance, artifact provenance, and verification evidence.
A risk-governance approach asks whether a release should move and what evidence supports that decision, not only whether the pipeline can move.
Agentic coordination may be framed as surfacing fragmented signals and routing higher-risk decisions to human review.
unsupported_claims: Any product-specific DevOps or agent capability not revalidated against current primary documentation.
Any quantified claim about deployment speed, failure reduction, or business outcomes.
Any assertion that agentic systems can safely replace engineering judgment.
